component.name: ClawBoot
component.summary: Set up a local Qwen-powered whole-Pi OpenClaw assistant

description.p: A graphical Raspberry Pi 5 setup wizard for installing OpenClaw with a fully local Qwen 3.5 2B or 4B model through Ollama.
It configures web search, page reading, an isolated Chromium browser, Telegram, and live WhatsApp QR linking without requiring terminal commands.

The Full Pi assistant profile is intentionally root-equivalent: it gives the OpenClaw service account host-wide file access, unrestricted command execution, and passwordless sudo. Only pair accounts you trust.
